name: Backspin Social | Indoor Golf & Bar
about: Backspin Social is an indoor golf and bar venue featuring four extra-large golf simulators with access to over 1,800 courses worldwide, including famous ones. It offers a social environment where guests can play golf, craft cocktails, local draft beer, and a large whiskey selection. The venue provides space for events, birthday parties, work events, and team happy hours, with capacity for over 200 people. Technology includes state-of-the-art simulators with instant feedback and data capture for game improvement, and it hosts leagues, contests, and memberships for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor EYE XO launch monitors providing instant feedback with high accuracy and 24 data points
Access to over 1,800 golf courses worldwide, including famous ones, with E6 & TGC software
Social atmosphere with a full bar, lounge areas, and event space for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen available with food options for events and casual dining.
Full bar with craft cocktails, local draft beer, and a large whiskey selection.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead (Mounted) Launch Monitor using 2 high-speed cameras for instant shot feedback with high accuracy and in-depth data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are provided for use with the simulators. You are welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full bar and kitchen with food options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Backspin Social is family-friendly and welcomes children, making it suitable for family events and outings.
